questionTitle: cy Which application do you want to make?

challengeRentIncrease.label: cy Challenge the rent increase proposed in a landlord's notice proposing a new rent
challengeRentIncrease.hint: cy Including if you also want to challenge the legal validity of the landlord's notice

challengeExcessiveRent.label: cy Challenge my rent as excessive within the first 6 months of the tenancy

applicationType.required: cy Select which application you want to make
